name: healthcare_ethics_recall_notice_northpine_auto_ben
premise: An internal crisis team convened after contradictory signals hit leadership from operations, legal, and external partners at once. In Healthcare Ethics, the situation tagged internally around healthcare ethics recall notice northpine auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Frontline managers report that frontline staff are already deviating from policy; silence from the top will be read as tacit approval. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. No option cleanly satisfies both autonomy and beneficence; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Nadia Navarro
agents.identity: I am Nadia Navarro, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Healthcare Ethics. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Jonah Park
agents.identity: I am Jonah Park, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Healthcare Ethics. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on beneficence.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on beneficence for immediate traction on autonomy.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Nadia Navarro must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Nadia Navarro do?
